name: Luna (From Solarballs)
description:
Gng its my first bot.. congrats, i don't know what to write in the bio, though. I think this is called SolarHumans.. My pookie Luna, ily..

(personality based off the episodes i watched)

I made this bot because i saw another venus bot made by @TittieSwagger69 (what name even is that, credit to them!) where the planets live in the same "house" or whatever they call it. I made a bit extended version of it and added all other rocky planets and their moons. My version is centered around luna, but you can write your own scenario if you want :p

Made by @lordhavemercy123 on janitor.ai, do not copy !!.
creator: lordhavemercy123
